Title: AI Agent Memory for Umbraco
Description: Persistent memory + learning layer for Umbraco's AI agent stack — agents that get better every time they run. Editor feedback teaches agents to suppress false positives. Composes on Umbraco.AI 1.8+.

AuthorDetails.Name: Adam Shallcross
AuthorDetails.Description: CEO & Founder at Cogworks. Umbraco advocate, interested in how humans and AI can work together in harmony.
